---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Provide a short description of your suggestion or idea.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful?

What problem does it solve, or what improvement would it bring to the ROM?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

If yes, please describe them.

## Additional Information

Add any additional context, screenshots, references, or examples that may help explain the request.

## Notes

- Please check existing issues before creating a new feature request.
- Not all feature requests can be implemented.
- Requests that conflict with project goals, stability, security, or maintainability may be declined.

> [!NOTE]
> This is a hobby project maintained in my free time. I appreciate all suggestions and feedback, but development time is limited and priorities may change.
